title: McKelvey Engineering well-represented at Innovation & Entrepreneurship Awards
summary_en: Students, faculty and alumni honored across multiple programs at Skandalaris Center event.

title: BME doctoral student Chukwu wins first place, People’s Choice awards at PhD-in-3D competition

title: McKelvey Engineering students build new aerospace design team
summary_en: WashU VTOL focuses on autonomous vertical take-off and landing aircraft.
title_cn: 圣路易斯华盛顿大学麦凯尔维工程学院学生组建新型航空航天设计团队
